# @mog-sdk/embed public API snapshot
# Auto-generated. Run `pnpm check:api-snapshots --update` to regenerate.

## dist/config.d.cts
export function assertValidMogEmbedConfig(value: unknown): asserts value is MogEmbedConfig
export function validateMogEmbedConfig(value: unknown): MogEmbedConfigValidationError[]
export interface MogEmbedChromeOptions { formulaBar?: boolean; sheetTabs?: boolean; headers?: boolean; gridlines?: boolean; scrollbars?: boolean; zoomControls?: boolean; }
export interface MogEmbedConfig { source: MogEmbedSourceRef; requestedMode?: EmbedMode; sheet?: number | string; range?: string; chrome?: MogEmbedChromeOptions; theme?: MogEmbedThemeOptions; locale?:  ...
export interface MogEmbedConfigValidationError { readonly field: string; readonly message: string; }
export interface MogEmbedEffectiveState { readonly mode: EmbedMode; readonly capabilities: readonly string[]; readonly deniedCapabilities: readonly string[]; readonly savePolicy: MogEmbedSavePolicy; r ...
export interface MogEmbedEventMap { lifecycleChange: MogEmbedLifecycleState; effectiveStateChange: MogEmbedEffectiveState; sheetChange: { index: number; name: string; sheetId: string; }; selectionChan ...
export interface MogEmbedHostPolicy { resolveSource(config: MogEmbedConfig): Promise<MogEmbedResolvedSource> | MogEmbedResolvedSource; resolveEffectiveState(config: MogEmbedConfig): Promise<MogEmbedEf ...
export interface MogEmbedResolvedSource { /** * Host-authorized XLSX materialization for this embed session. * * These bytes are not accepted directly from public component props. They * must be retur ...
export interface MogEmbedSourceRef { kind: 'document' | 'file' | 'snapshot' | 'host-callback' | 'live-session'; /** * Issued source handle — not an arbitrary URL, path, callback name, * provider confi ...
export interface MogEmbedThemeOptions { workbookTheme?: 'from-document' | string; chromeTheme?: 'host' | string; }
export type EmbedMode = 'readonly' | 'comment' | 'review' | 'protected-edit' | 'full-edit'
export type MogEmbedCollaborationMode = 'none' | 'local-only' | 'live'
export type MogEmbedLifecycleState = 'initializing' | 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error' | 'disposed'
export type MogEmbedSavePolicy = 'none' | 'export-only' | 'host-callback' | 'autosave'

export interface MogEmbedChromeOptions { formulaBar?: boolean; sheetTabs?: boolean; headers?: boolean; gridlines?: boolean; scrollbars?: boolean; zoomControls?: boolean; }
export interface MogEmbedConfig { source: MogEmbedSourceRef; requestedMode?: EmbedMode; sheet?: number | string; range?: string; chrome?: MogEmbedChromeOptions; theme?: MogEmbedThemeOptions; locale?:  ...
export interface MogEmbedConfigValidationError { readonly field: string; readonly message: string; }
export interface MogEmbedEffectiveState { readonly mode: EmbedMode; readonly capabilities: readonly string[]; readonly deniedCapabilities: readonly string[]; readonly savePolicy: MogEmbedSavePolicy; r ...
export interface MogEmbedEventMap { lifecycleChange: MogEmbedLifecycleState; effectiveStateChange: MogEmbedEffectiveState; sheetChange: { index: number; name: string; sheetId: string; }; selectionChan ...
export interface MogEmbedHostPolicy { resolveSource(config: MogEmbedConfig): Promise<MogEmbedResolvedSource> | MogEmbedResolvedSource; resolveEffectiveState(config: MogEmbedConfig): Promise<MogEmbedEf ...
export interface MogEmbedResolvedSource { /** * Host-authorized XLSX materialization for this embed session. * * These bytes are not accepted directly from public component props. They * must be retur ...
export interface MogEmbedSourceRef { kind: 'document' | 'file' | 'snapshot' | 'host-callback' | 'live-session'; /** * Issued source handle — not an arbitrary URL, path, callback name, * provider confi ...
export interface MogEmbedThemeOptions { workbookTheme?: 'from-document' | string; chromeTheme?: 'host' | string; }
export type EmbedEventMap = { ready: void; status: EmbedStatus; error: Error; sheetChange: number; select: { row: number; col: number; }; }
export type EmbedMode = 'readonly' | 'comment' | 'review' | 'protected-edit' | 'full-edit'
export type EmbedStatus = 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error' | 'disposed'
export type MogEmbedCollaborationMode = 'none' | 'local-only' | 'live'
export type MogEmbedLifecycleState = 'initializing' | 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error' | 'disposed'
export type MogEmbedSavePolicy = 'none' | 'export-only' | 'host-callback' | 'autosave'

## dist/react.d.cts
export const MogSheet: react.ForwardRefExoticComponent<MogSheetProps & react.RefAttributes<MogSheetHandle>>

export function validateMogEmbedConfig(value: unknown): MogEmbedConfigValidationError[]

export interface MogEmbedResolvedSource { /** * Host-authorized XLSX materialization for this embed session. * * These bytes are not accepted directly from public component props. They * must be retur ...
export interface MogEmbedSourceRef { kind: 'document' | 'file' | 'snapshot' | 'host-callback' | 'live-session'; /** * Issued source handle — not an arbitrary URL, path, callback name, * provider confi ...
export interface MogEmbedThemeOptions { workbookTheme?: 'from-document' | string; chromeTheme?: 'host' | string; }
export interface MogSheetChange { index: number; name: string; sheetId: string; }
export interface MogSheetHandle { /** Current lifecycle status. */ getStatus(): EmbedStatus; /** Switch sheets through the same path as the built-in sheet tabs. */ setSheet(indexOrName: number | strin ...
export interface MogSheetProps { /** Raw string/byte sources are not accepted on the public API. */ src?: never; /** Host-resolved source, mode, capability, save, and collaboration request. */ config: ...
export interface MogSheetSelection { row: number; col: number; }
export interface ScrollPosition { readonly x: number; readonly y: number; }
export interface SheetEventScrollChange { readonly type: 'scroll-change'; readonly position: ScrollPosition; readonly viewportId: string; }
export interface SheetEventZoomChange { readonly type: 'zoom-change'; readonly zoom: number; }
export type EmbedMode = 'readonly' | 'comment' | 'review' | 'protected-edit' | 'full-edit'
export type EmbedStatus = 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error' | 'disposed'
export type MogEmbedCollaborationMode = 'none' | 'local-only' | 'live'
export type MogEmbedLifecycleState = 'initializing' | 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error' | 'disposed'
export type MogEmbedSavePolicy = 'none' | 'export-only' | 'host-callback' | 'autosave'

export interface MogSheetProps { /** Raw string/byte sources are not accepted on the public API. */ src?: never; /** Host-resolved source, mode, capability, save, and collaboration request. */ config: ...
export interface MogSheetSelection { row: number; col: number; }

export interface SheetEventZoomChange { readonly type: 'zoom-change'; readonly zoom: number; }

export type MogEmbedLifecycleState = 'initializing' | 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error' | 'disposed'
export { EmbedMode, MogEmbedConfig, MogEmbedEffectiveState, MogEmbedHostPolicy, MogSheetElement }
